headline: Janus Living: The Pure Play On Senior Housing Growth

headline: Barclays Initiates Coverage On Healthpeak Properties with Equal-Weight Rating, Announces Price Target of $23
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   initiates coverage on Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Equal-Weight rating and announces Price Target of $23.
